name: Artifact Storage
description: Stores and retrieves named artifacts — design specs, research notes, code analysis.

tools.name: knowledge-artifacts.listArtifacts
tools.description: Lists artifacts. Signature: artifacts.listArtifacts({ taskId?: string }).

tools.name: knowledge-artifacts.saveArtifact
tools.description: Creates a new artifact. Signature: artifacts.saveArtifact({ name: string, content: string }).

tools.name: knowledge-artifacts.readArtifact
tools.description: Reads an artifact. Signature: artifacts.readArtifact({ name: string }).
